findings.message: redis-exporter service added with hard dependency on redis:6379, but redis service is only defined in dev.yml (profiles: ["dev", "lite"]). When observability.yml is merged into staging/prod via deploy strategy, redis-exporter will fail to start because redis service does not exist in those environments.
findings.suggestion: Either (1) add redis to services.yml or prod/staging overlays, (2) move redis-exporter definition to dev.yml only, (3) make redis-exporter conditional on redis service existence, or (4) use environment variable APP_REDIS_ADDR to allow connection to managed Redis instance without local service definition.
